items.title: Iran targets headquarters of Iranian Kurdish forces in Iraq
items.dek: Tehran's strikes come amid speculation that the US wants Iranian Kurdish groups to join the fight against Iran.
items.body: Tehran's strikes come amid speculation that the US wants Iranian Kurdish groups to join the fight against Iran.

items.title: Musk tells jury 'people read too much' into his posts
items.dek: The billionaire is accused of misleading investors in the run-up to his 2022 Twitter purchase.
